Name: Raspberry Pi
Purpose: Inputs camera and button data and outputs servo positions

Name: Terminal Block
Purpose: Connects 14AWG wire to power supply and servo drivers

Name: Header Row (F)
Purpose: Structural and electrical support between PCB and Raspberry Pi

Name: Push Button
Purpose: User presses a button that corresponds to a type of candy

Name: PCB
Purpose: Connects power supply to Raspberry Pi and servo drivers, connects Raspberry Pi to servo drivers and buttons

Name: Servo (6-pack)
Purpose: Converts PWM signal into positional radial motion

Name: Camera
Purpose: Captures candy bowl and identifies different candy types

Name: Shafts (8-pack)
Purpose: Structurally strong rod that provides an axis for rotation

Name: Bearings (20-pack)
Purpose: Allows for fluid motion between shafts and 3D prints

Name: M4 Screws
Purpose: Screws for structural parts like plates and servos

Name: M2.5 Screws
Purpose: Screws for electronics like camera and Raspberry Pi

Name: Filament
Purpose: Material that 3D printer turns into custom parts

Name: 14AWG Wire
Purpose: Runs power between power supply, PCB, and controllers

Name: I2C to PWM (2-pack)
Purpose: Converts Raspberry Pi I2C to servo PWM

Name: Wall Outlet
Purpose: Converts wall power to supply's screw terminals
